---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A brief description of the feature you would like to see.

## Problem It Solves

What problem or limitation does this address? Who is affected?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this working. Include UI flows, API changes, or data model changes if relevant.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you have thought about and why you prefer the proposed solution.

## Scope Check

Please confirm this fits Fanek's scope:

- [ ] This is about tracking clients and their subscribed services.
- [ ] This is NOT a CRM feature (no sales pipeline or marketing).
- [ ] This is NOT a helpdesk feature (no tickets or SLAs).
- [ ] This is NOT a billing feature (no invoices or payments).

## Additional Context

Any mockups, links, or references that would help clarify the request.
